title: Orthochilus ecristatus
taxonomy: Orthochilus ecristatus belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This family comprises approximately 30,000 known species of orchids, making it one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. Within the Orchidaceae family, Orthochilus ecristatus is classified under the subfamily Orchidoideae, which includes most terrestrial orchids. The genus Orthochilus is further divided into several species, with Orthochilus ecristatus being one of them. This classification helps in identifying and understanding the evolutionary relationships among different orchid species.
